title: Enlarge 'Join Now For Tournament' text, resize animated boy, and shrink boards

requirements.text: Enlarge and bold the 'Join Now For Tournament' button text. The element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[2]/a[2]/span[4] should have a noticeably larger font size (e.g., increase by at least one to two size steps) and heavier font weight so the call-to-action label is more prominent.

quotes: Join Now For Tournament Wala Thora SA Bhara kro text ko

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Join Now For Tournament' span text is visibly larger and bolder than before.
The button still renders correctly on mobile and desktop without overflow or layout breakage.

requirements.text: Reduce the size of the animated shooting boy character in HeroSection. Scale down the SVG boy element (decrease its width/height or transform scale) so it occupies less vertical and horizontal space in the hero scene while keeping the animation intact.
acceptanceCriteria: The animated boy character is visibly smaller than the current version.
All CSS keyframe animations (shooting, firing) continue to play correctly on the smaller character.
The hero layout remains balanced and the character does not overlap other elements.

requirements.text: Shrink the target board(s) in the HeroSection shooting animation. Reduce the width and height of the board SVG element(s) so they appear noticeably smaller within the scene.

quotes: aik board ko chota chota kro

acceptanceCriteria: The target board(s) are visibly smaller than the current version.
The shooting animation still targets the board correctly after the resize.
No visual artifacts or misalignment in the hero scene after scaling down the board.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).
Do not alter the shooting animation logic or keyframes — only resize/scale the involved SVG elements.
Apply changes only to the identified element and HeroSection component; do not affect other sections.
nonGoals: Redesigning the overall hero section layout.
Changing colors or theme of the hero animation.
Adding new animation sequences or characters.
